# skillsmith

> Create, test, and share Claude Code skills. The npm registry for AI agent skills.

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md): Create, test, and share Claude Code skills. The npm registry for AI agent skills.

- This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org) so AI agents can
  discover this repo's docs without scraping. Generated from the README + key docs.
